titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 216: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 216. (A.R. No. 489 of 1925.) SEMBIYAṈMAHĀDĒVI, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, central shrine, Kailāsanāthasvāmi temple.

It records an endowment of 158 kaḻañju of gold by one pirāṭṭiyār (queen) who probably hailed from Paṅgaḷa-nāḍu. The amount was left with the chaturvēdibhaṭṭas of Sembiyanmahādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam created by the (queen) Sembiyaṉ Mahādēviyār in Aḷa-nāḍu. With the interest on that amount, offerings were to be made to god Kailāsam-uḍaiya-Mahādēva on the day of Kēṭṭai in Chittirai month of every year, being the natal star of Parāntakaṉ-Mādēvaḍigaḷ alias Sembiyaṉ Mahādēviyār, the queen mother of Uttama-chōḷa and the chaturvēdi-bhaṭṭas were to feast on those offerings.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 458.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī .. koppara[ kecarivarma] ṟkku tu kaṇṭan maturāntakadevarāṉa śrī Uttamacoḻadevarait tiruvayiṟuvāytta Uṭaiyapirāṭṭiyār śrī
parān=takaṉ mātevaṭikaḷāṉa [śrīcempiyaṉ mahā]deviyār ceytaruḷiṉa teṉkarai Aḷaṉāṭṭu brahmadeyam cempiyaṉmahā deviccaturvedi
maṅkalattu caturvedibhaṭ śrī kayi[lāsamuṭaiya] mahādevar śrī koyilile Ippirāṭṭiyār tirunāḷāṉa cittirait tirukke
ṭṭaiy nāḷ meykkāṭṭi Uṇpatāka paṅkaḷa ṉāṭuṭaiyār A peruma ṇap pirāṭṭiyār Ivvūr Ūrkallāl ku(ṭ)ṭutta poṉ 100 5 10 8 Ippoṉ ṉū
ṟṟaiñpatteṇ kaḻañcum Iddharmam cantrāditya(ya)vaṟ niṟkkum vaṇṇam Ippoṉ mutalaḻiyāmey Itiṉāl vanta bhogamuṇṇap peṟuvārāka vaiyttu ...
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 216 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
